title: watch this if you feel like a failure
description:
Head to https://betterhelp.com/allisonbaek for 10% off your first month of therapy with our sponsor, BetterHelp. Make your mental health and growth a positive focus this year. 🩵

if you've ever sat quietly in your room, watching the world on your phone get richer, skinnier, prettier than you... i've felt that way for years.

you can never catch a break. just when you thought you had a perfect opportunity, it slips right out of your hands. you didn't get the job. you can't afford those clothes. t
